package repository

import "context"

// AreaCodesRepository is a draft repository boundary for areaCodes.

type AreaCodesRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query AreaCodesQuery) ([]AreaCode, error)

type AreaCodesQuery struct {
	Keywords []string

}
